transcript: Rupa Menon: Action: confirm ERP integration owner by 2026-06-10. Vishwa Rao: Decision: Korea launch waits on pricing governance. AP Automation is blocked and amber until ERP is signed off.
Aksha Shah: Action: send updated KPI evidence by Friday. Prahari Singh: Decision: privacy remediation remains red until control evidence is complete.
Dhruva Iyer: Action: refresh forecast bridge by 2026-07-01. Vishwa Rao: Renewal uplift engine is green after partner pipeline review.
Rupa Menon: Action item: close supplier terms dependency by next week. Decision: procurement wave moves to pilot. Vendor consolidation sprint is amber due to supplier resistance.
Prahari Singh: Decision: no production launch before security review. Data privacy remediation is blocked while architecture approval is pending.
Dhruva Iyer: Action: validate cloud spend baseline by 2026-08-15. Cloud spend governance is on track and green after finance sign-off.
Vishwa Rao: Decision: analytics academy cohort starts in September. Rupa Menon: Action: confirm participant list by Friday. Analytics academy launch is amber until manager nominations land.
Aksha Shah: Action: attach evidence pack to controls review by 2026-06-30. Controls evidence uplift is red because two audit samples are overdue.
Dhruva Iyer: Decision: warranty claim prevention stays in scope for Q3. Action: publish supplier quality gate owner by Monday.
Vishwa Rao: Action: update executive summary for price leakage monitor by 2026-06-20. Price leakage monitor is green after discount policy approval.
